top_tweets.text:
i've been building things for developers for a long time which means i have a lot of experience with api design

but LLMs are making me reset a bit

instead of neat simple APIs it's probably worth trading that off for more powerful APIs
top_tweets.author: thdxr
top_tweets.name: dax
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者從長期 API 設計經驗出發，認為 LLM 時代應重新思考取捨：與其追求簡潔的 API，不如提供更強大的功能介面。

top_tweets.text:
A few people are asking so let me explain.

So firstly why concept art is dead.
We used to be a core part of in-house development teams. Working alongside designers to visualise the world.
Nowadays it feels more like we are just asset designers, and as more concept work moves to
top_tweets.author: jadel4w
top_tweets.name: Jade Law
top_tweets.summary_zh: 概念藝術家指出產業變化：過去是開發團隊核心、與設計師共同構建世界觀，現在更像資產設計師，外包趨勢加劇。

top_tweets.text:
Alright I’m gonna say it. 

The Obama Library is unappealing in almost every way imaginable. 

Zero interesting lines, the details look sloppy and jumbled, and a complete lack of contrast and color.  

Anytime you see a great design the superlatives should flow easily when https://t.co/IkRQ0nykX7
top_tweets.author: luusssso
top_tweets.name: lusso
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者批評歐巴馬圖書館設計缺乏吸引力：線條無趣、細節凌亂、缺乏對比與色彩，認為優秀設計應能自然激發讚美。

top_tweets.text:
Spending time learning graphs and networking theory is one of the highest-ROI investments you can make. It quietly compounds across distributed systems, AI, infrastructure, markets, and even social dynamics.

Solid starters: Barabási – Network Science; Easley/Kleinberg –
top_tweets.author: TheAhmadOsman
top_tweets.name: Ahmad
top_tweets.summary_zh: 學習圖論與網絡理論是高投報的投資，能靜默複利於分散式系統、AI、基礎設施、市場與社會動態等多個領域。推薦 Barabási 與 Easley/Kleinberg 的入門書籍。

top_tweets.text:
Design for the central hub area within the Cryo Archive.

The goal was to push this area into a more organic visual language in order to contrast the otherwise angular and mechanical visuals of the UESC.

Incredible final in-game model was built by Eve Astra. https://t.co/teHkwxMOlx
top_tweets.author: d_goryainov
top_tweets.name: Dima Goryainov
top_tweets.summary_zh: 《Marathon》Cryo Archive 中央樞紐區的設計分享，刻意採用有機視覺語言來對比 UESC 原本的機械與稜角風格。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: pumaDB
top_products.author: Stuart Sim
top_products.tagline: a small hosted memory layer for AI agents
top_products.summary_zh: 為 AI agents 設計的小型託管記憶層服務，提供快速的資料存取與狀態管理功能。

top_products.title: Pixlie
top_products.author: Illia Ovcharenko
top_products.tagline: AI video studio: text & image to video, with real control
top_products.summary_zh: AI 影片製作工具，可將文字或圖片轉換為影片，並提供細緻的控制選項給創作者使用。

top_products.title: Basedash Access Controls
top_products.author: Max Musing
top_products.tagline: Control exactly who can access your company data
top_products.summary_zh: 企業資料存取權限管理工具，讓管理者能精確控制不同使用者對公司資料的存取範圍。

top_products.title: Are you in the Weights?
top_products.author: Thomas Dimson
top_products.tagline: Find out if you live forever in the brain of the LLMs
top_products.summary_zh: 檢測工具，讓你查詢自己的資訊是否已被大型語言模型（LLM）訓練資料收錄。

top_products.title: Reframe
top_products.author: Maik Klotz
top_products.summary_zh: 復古風格的網頁瀏覽器，重現 1999 年代的上網體驗與介面設計。

top_products.title: GitSync for macOS
top_products.author: Kevin Tobler
top_products.tagline: Visual GitHub management directly from a graphical interface
top_products.summary_zh: macOS 平台的 GitHub 管理工具，透過圖形化介面提供視覺化的版本控制操作。
